codeReview.summary: Current HEAD now contains explicit route-level proof for the originally missing behavior. `tests/app.test.ts` now verifies `/onchain/networks/:network/tokens/:address` returns live DeFiLlama pricing on success and falls back to seeded pricing on provider failure, verifies `/onchain/networks/:network/tokens/:address/info` falls back to seeded metadata pricing when DeFiLlama is unavailable, and keeps token OHLCV fallback coverage for missing The Graph swaps. The runtime implementation in `src/modules/onchain.ts` matches those assertions by sourcing live token prices through `fetchLiveSimpleTokenPrice` and returning graceful fallback behavior when live providers return null.`

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared architecture note is stale for onchain behavior. It still says all onchain routes are fixture-backed and describes token OHLCV as synthetic-only, even though current HEAD uses live DeFiLlama pricing for token detail/info routes and live The Graph swaps for token/pool OHLCV when available.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/.factory/library/architecture.md:24-30 says all 29 onchain routes are fixture-backed; compare with src/modules/onchain.ts:1261-1280, src/modules/onchain.ts:2668-2794, and src/modules/onchain.ts:3174-3209, which call live DeFiLlama/The Graph-backed helpers and fall back only when providers return null.
